Real-time notifications to parents
Why Learn to Enlight

Parents know everything.
Nothing is missed.

Most coaching centers are a black box. LTE is different - parents receive real-time updates on every class, every exam, every homework submission.

📅
Weekly Syllabus Ahead of Time
Before every class, parents and students know exactly what topics will be covered. No surprises, full preparation.
Sent every week
⏱️
Timed Exams - No Cheating
Every weekly exam is timed and submitted through our system. Delay in submission triggers an instant parent notification.
Instant alert if delayed
📊
Marks & Feedback Shared
After every exam, marks are recorded and feedback is written by the instructor. Parents can see exactly where their child stands.
Visible in Student Portal
📹
Class Recordings Always Available
Every class is recorded. Students can rewatch any session at any time through their personal student portal.
Lifetime access with active fee
🔔
Instant Alert - Miss Nothing
If a student misses class, skips an exam, or does not submit homework - parents get an instant Telegram notification. No exceptions.
Zero delay notifications
🎯
Focused on One Goal
Every class, every exam, and every note is designed specifically for Cadet College admission. This is not generic tutoring.
Cadet admission only

Your Instructor
Md. Kayes
✓ Ex-Cadet, Cumilla
Instructor

Md. Kayes

Lead Instructor & Founder, Learn to Enlight

Md. Kayes is an Ex-Cadet of Cumilla Cadet College - which means he has personally gone through the exact same admission process your child is preparing for. He understands the exam, the pressure, and what it takes to succeed from first-hand experience.

As a CSE Engineer from the Islamic University of Technology (IUT) and currently pursuing his Masters at the University of Dhaka, he brings both academic depth and structured thinking to every class.

Beyond teaching, he works as a Software Engineer with expertise in Automation and Project Management Tools - which is why the LTE student portal, notifications and tracking system runs so smoothly.

Ex-Cadet - Cumilla Cadet College
B.Sc. in CSE - Islamic University of Technology (IUT)
Masters (Ongoing) - University of Dhaka
Personally mentors every student in the batch

Fill the Application Form
Complete the admission form with student and parent details. Takes less than 3 minutes.
💳
Complete Payment
Pay via bKash, Rocket or Islami Bank. Existing students pay directly without refilling the form.
🚀
Get Your Student Portal
Your child's private learning dashboard is activated. Classes, recordings, and results - all in one place.

LTE Batch
FAQ

Questions parents usually ask

Who is Learn to Enlight for? +
LTE is designed for Class 5 and Class 6 students who want to prepare for Cadet College admission. Our batches focus specifically on the Math, Science, and GK topics that appear in the Cadet College entrance exam.
Are classes fully online? +
Yes. All classes are conducted online via Google Meet. Students can join from anywhere in Bangladesh. Every class is recorded and available in the student's personal portal for rewatching.
How do parents stay updated? +
Parents receive real-time Telegram notifications for everything - weekly syllabus before each class, exam results after each test, and instant alerts if homework is submitted late. Nothing is missed.
What is the student portal? +
Each enrolled student gets a unique private dashboard where they can access all class recordings, notes and question papers, exam copies, marks, instructor feedback, and homework submissions - organized by date.
Can I pay monthly instead of full year? +
Yes. Monthly payment is ২,৫০০৳ (Class 5) or ৩,০০০৳ (Special Batch), due by the 10th of each month. We also offer 3-month, 6-month, and full-year options with attractive discounts. Students who pay for the full year get lifetime access to all materials.
Is there a referral benefit? +
Yes! If a student refers 3 new students who enroll in a single month, they get 20% off their next month's fee. Top students are also recognized and rewarded every 6 months.
How do I apply? +
Click "Apply Now" and fill in the admission form - it takes about 3 minutes. After submitting, you'll receive payment instructions. Once payment is confirmed, your child's student portal is activated.
